scope: Native MORI standard-EP compact dispatch/combine kernel-body count-offset cleanup.

source_change.dispatch_kernel: Reordered the recv-count metadata path to carry expertMajorBase and expertSrcPrefix cumulatively instead of recomputing them from recv_counts_rank_major inside each source/expert copy region.
source_change.combine_kernel: Applied the same cumulative expertMajorBase/expertSrcPrefix rewrite to the native compact combine path.
source_change.safety: Rank-level count assertions remain outside the per-row copy loop; per-region bounds assertions remain in the copy loop.
what_did_not_change: No TorchTitan standard-EP fallback behavior was changed.

clean_rebuild.note: A plain ninja build initially reported no work to do, so a clean rebuild was used to force the header change through compilation.

library_import_smoke.command: from mori.ops import BalancedMoeCompactDispatchOutput, EpDispatchCombineOp; from mori import cpp

native_compact_training_smoke.read: ABI/autograd correctness smoke only; S128 one-step timing includes startup/JIT overhead and is not a perf promotion.

decision: Keep patch and use the next MBS4 native compact A/B to measure whether dispatch/combine body cost moves against the current count-aware native branch.
